Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to inform email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features accurate, up-to-date product information and pricing, eliminating manual content research.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a fully written daily marketing email with subject line, body copy, and CTAs tailored to R1 Concepts branding.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email copy daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work each week.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes the AI-generated email via HubSpot Marketing Email API and sends it to segmented contact lists.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the entire email delivery pipeline, ensuring consistent daily outreach to customers and prospects without manual scheduling.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Pulls current Dynamic Friction Company product data, promotions, and brand messaging from the DFC website.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with the latest DFC inventory and offers, removing the need for manual product lookups.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email with DFC-specific messaging, subject lines, and calls to action using Claude AI.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, compelling email content every day tailored to DFC's B2B audience, eliminating creative bottlenecks.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the finalized marketing email through HubSpot Marketing Email API to DFC's contact lists.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures reliable, automated daily email campaigns reach the right DFC contacts with full tracking and analytics.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot including customer details, issue descriptions, and order history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all support ticket data in real time, giving the AI full context to handle each case accurately.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a context-aware reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Dramatically reduces first-response time by auto-categorizing tickets and pre-writing replies, letting agents focus on complex cases.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI classification, attaches the draft reply, and routes it to the appropriate support agent.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Streamlines the support workflow so agents open tickets already categorized with a ready-to-send response, cutting resolution time significantly.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured in HubSpot from customer interactions.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all customer return and issue data from a single source of truth, ensuring no submission is missed for analysis.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs each form submission into a structured Google Sheet for team review, trend analysis, and reporting.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and quality teams a live, sortable dashboard of customer issues, enabling faster identification of recurring product problems.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity on the R1 website, including page views, product browsing, and engagement signals.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures high-intent buying signals the moment they happen, giving the sales team a real-time window into customer interest.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alerts to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams messages and email notifications with customer activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables sales reps to reach out to active customers within minutes of engagement, dramatically increasing conversion opportunities.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent on the R1 Concepts website, handling product questions and support inquiries in real time.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide instant 24/7 customer assistance, reducing support ticket volume and improving the online shopping experience.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will process customer inputs and generate accurate, brand-aligned responses using an AI model (platform to be determined).
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will handle routine inquiries autonomously, freeing up human support agents for escalated and complex issues.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide net across the open web to surface creators that traditional platform searches would miss.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls creator profiles, follower counts, engagement metrics, and content details from YouTube and Instagram.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Builds rich creator profiles with real performance data, replacing hours of manual social media research per candidate.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and ranks discovered creators by relevance, niche alignment, and audience fit using AI-powered keyword matching.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Surfaces the most promising creator candidates instantly, turning a days-long manual discovery process into minutes.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores discovered creators against customizable weighted criteria including engagement, audience quality, niche fit, and content consistency.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Eliminates subjective guesswork in creator selection by producing data-driven qualification scores, ensuring marketing budget is spent on high-value partnerships.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and brand guidelines from Google Drive to inform message generation.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand standards, maintaining consistency across all creator communications.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator using learned sequences, creator profile data, and brand prompts.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces highly personalized, persuasive outreach at scale, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic templates.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails to qualified creators and tracks delivery status.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the entire outreach send process, enabling the team to contact dozens of creators daily without manual effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors inbox for creator replies and retrieves full conversation threads including previous negotiation context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator response is missed and provides complete conversation history for informed follow-up.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations and negotiation patterns to inform AI response generation.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation experience, producing replies that reflect proven deal-closing strategies.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts context-aware negotiation replies using learned conversation patterns, creator responses, and deal parameters.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles ongoing creator negotiations autonomously with human-like nuance, accelerating partnership deals while maintaining favorable terms.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify qualifying products.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual cross-referencing between vehicle lists and availability guides, ensuring no eligible parts are missed each week.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Generates a formatted DFC load sheet and sales sheet from the matched vehicle-part data for the current week's Must Have Monday campaign.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Produces publish-ready load sheets in seconds instead of manual formatting, ensuring consistency and accuracy every week.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Creates and sends the weekly Must Have Monday email in HubSpot, attaching the generated sales sheet and load sheet to the campaign.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Automates the entire email build-and-send process, guaranteeing timely weekly delivery to the DFC distribution list without manual intervention.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Sends a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the weekly MHM load sheet and email have been successfully generated and sent.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Keeps the sales and marketing team informed in real time, providing visibility into campaign status without checking HubSpot directly.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for DFC First to Market product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product details and launch context.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished, on-brand email copy in minutes, freeing marketing from repetitive writing tasks for every new product launch.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates draft emails in HubSpot with the AI-generated copy, sales sheet assets, and proper segmentation for First to Market and monthly recap campaigns.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers ready-to-review email drafts directly in HubSpot, reducing campaign setup time from hours to minutes and ensuring no launch is missed.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including lead counts, conversion rates, and email performance data for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automatically pulls CRM performance data that would otherwise require manual HubSpot report exports and copy-pasting into slides.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Collects website traffic metrics from GA4, search performance data from Search Console, and SMS campaign metrics from Attentive for the monthly period.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck with the aggregated metrics, charts, and formatted data from all sources.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Transforms what was a multi-hour manual slide-building task into an automated update, ensuring the deck is accurate, consistent, and ready for stakeholder review.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current search performance and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms compared to competitors in the brake parts space.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints high-opportunity keywords that competitors rank for but R1 Concepts does not, creating a data-driven content strategy instead of guesswork.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, incorporating product-relevant content and search intent alignment.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready long-form content at scale, enabling a consistent publishing cadence that would require a dedicated content writer otherwise.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog posts to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO optimization including meta tags, readability checks, and schema markup.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Automates the full publish workflow with SEO best practices baked in, ensuring every post is properly optimized from the moment it goes live.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Processes and extracts vendor purchase order data from Dream ERP exports, identifying open POs that require follow-up.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Eliminates manual ERP report pulling and data sorting, ensuring no outstanding vendor POs slip through the cracks.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms the PO data into structured contact and deal records, then uploads them to HubSpot to trigger automated vendor chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Automates the entire vendor follow-up process, reducing days of manual outreach into a systematic workflow that accelerates PO fulfillment.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number uploads and the New Availability Guide, then matches and cross-references parts against current availability.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Generates and exports a fully formatted DFC load sheet as an Excel file based on the matched part number results.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Delivers a ready-to-distribute Excel load sheet in seconds, eliminating manual spreadsheet formatting and reducing errors in part number listings.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, clone the previous week's MHM SMS campaign, and prepare the new campaign shell.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Eliminates repetitive manual campaign setup in Attentive's UI, saving 15-20 minutes of clicking through the same workflow every week.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Extracts and analyzes DFC sales transaction data including purchase history, order frequency, product mix, and customer account details.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Creates customer segments and triggers automated email campaigns including reorder reminders, cross-sell recommendations, and win-back sequences for lapsed customers.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to segmented customer groups based on purchase behavior, complementing the HubSpot email automation with a second channel.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file upload from William Nguyen containing the current week's Super Session Saturday content.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the email to send Saturday at 8AM.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting auto shops, distributors, and fleet operators with topics relevant to DFC's product lines and industry.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Detects new Friction Friday video published on the DFC YouTube channel each week.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Auto-generates and publishes a blog post embedding the video with SEO-optimized copy and transcript summary.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Triggers a branded weekly email to the Friction Friday subscriber list featuring the new video and blog link.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Sends an SMS notification to opted-in contacts with a direct link to the new Friction Friday episode.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts customer records and their unique Dream CustomerIDs from the Dream ERP database for mapping.

Bomb File Project.action: Scoping requirements, data sources, and deliverables for the Bomb File project during the planning stage.

Claudia Automation.action: Defining the automation scope and integration requirements for the Claudia automation project.

Shirly Invoice PDF Automation.action: Scoping the automated generation and delivery workflow for Shirly invoice PDFs.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.action: Detects new weekly R1 Concepts video published on the YouTube channel.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the latest week's performance data across all paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Analyzes current week performance against the previous month's average, identifying outliers, trends, and underperforming channels.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Extracts full-month performance metrics from all paid advertising channels at month end.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Delivers the formatted monthly report to stakeholders via email, ready to be dropped into end-of-month slide decks.
Monthly Report Bot.impact: Ensures leadership receives polished monthly performance summaries on schedule without any manual report building or formatting delays.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Pulls a list of customers who completed the Amazon flyer warranty registration form.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Extracts performance metrics and ad copy from all active campaigns across Meta and TikTok.

Paid Social Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report with flagged ads and recommended copy changes to the paid social team.

Asana Agent.action: Retrieves tasks, statuses, due dates, and assignee information from relevant Asana projects.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures meeting transcripts and notes from media team meetings held in Teams.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates new tasks in Asana with the extracted action items, assignees, and due dates from the meeting.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active search ad copy along with performance metrics like CTR, conversion rate, and quality score.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the latest data from the Agent Tracker spreadsheet including agent names, statuses, metrics, and update logs.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Automatically pulls the source-of-truth data without anyone needing to manually compile or copy information from the sheet.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Formats the raw spreadsheet data into a clean, easy-to-read weekly summary with highlights, status changes, and key callouts.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly agent tracker update to stakeholders via email.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification (make, model, year, etc.) through a HubSpot form to initiate the catalog request.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Provides a simple, standardized intake method so requests are structured and immediately actionable by automation.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries the DFC product catalog and Dream system to find all stocked parts matching the vehicle spec and identifies gaps in inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Replaces manual catalog lookups across multiple systems, delivering a complete stock-vs-gap analysis in seconds.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Organizes the matched and missing parts into a formatted Excel-ready structure with clear sections for what DFC stocks and what's absent.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Automates the formatting and organization work that previously required manual spreadsheet assembly, ensuring consistency every time.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the formatted Excel file back to Mark with the complete vehicle-specific catalog showing stocked and missing parts.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls the weekly backorder report and enriches each line item with live inventory status from Dream (on hand, on order, in transit).
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent lookups by centralizing real-time inventory data against every backordered part automatically.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Analyzes enriched backorder data to flag dead-end parts with no sourcing path and drafts customer communication templates for each order status scenario.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Surfaces the most critical supply issues instantly and generates ready-to-send customer updates, eliminating hours of manual triage and email drafting.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Sends the enriched backorder report with flagged issues and draft customer communications to the operations team.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables the team to immediately act on backorder issues and communicate proactively with customers, dramatically reducing response time.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to compile a comprehensive make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing three separate manufacturer websites and compiling fitment data into one source.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlaps and coverage gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where market opportunities exist, without requiring manual catalog comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor applications.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles the scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, decision-ready document that combines competitor intelligence, inventory analysis, and demand data for product planning.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns for specific phrases flagged in the investigation request.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly audits thousands of live ads for compliance or brand-sensitive language, a task that would take hours to do manually across platforms.

Meta Investigation.action: Matches flagged phrases against the scanned ad copy and compiles a detailed list showing the exact field and copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints the exact location of every phrase match with precision, eliminating false negatives and saving the team from line-by-line manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-list report showing every ad with matched phrases, the specific field, and the verbatim copy to the requesting team member.
